exceptions.reason: The latest firebase-functions-test release still depends on vulnerable ts-deepmerge ^2; forcing ts-deepmerge 8 is a major compatibility override.
exceptions.upgradePlan: Upgrade when firebase-functions-test adopts ts-deepmerge 8 or another patched compatible merge implementation, then remove this entry.

exceptions.reason: The latest firebase-tools release depends on @google-cloud/pubsub, which currently constrains @opentelemetry/core to the vulnerable 1.x line.
exceptions.upgradePlan: Upgrade firebase-tools when its Pub/Sub dependency accepts a patched OpenTelemetry release, then remove this entry.

exceptions.reason: The latest firebase-tools release depends on gaxios 6, which currently constrains uuid to the vulnerable 9.x line.
exceptions.upgradePlan: Upgrade firebase-tools when its gaxios dependency accepts uuid 11.1.1 or newer, then remove this entry.
